description: Reference environment — PHP API + Vue front end (two-process), preconfigured to import and launch. Clones coderflow-reference-apps and runs the php-vue app.

docker_config.pre_clone_instructions: RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y php-cli && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

application_server.name: PHP + Vue
application_server.start_command:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/php-vue/api && php -S 0.0.0.0:3001 router.php &
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/php-vue/web && npm run dev
